sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58530" key="kokkusth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοκκ-υστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n58530.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crower, screamer</tr_>, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg004:43:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
